attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT        
row_number() over(order by NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY asc)*-1  as  SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY   
,NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  START_TV_DT                 
,'3500-01-01'  END_TV_DT                     
,NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,100 SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE   
,NULL BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     
,NULL BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER            
,ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
,NP.ITEM_KEY  
,-999 DD_FB_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,-999 DD_FB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
, NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS DD_FB_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
,0 DV_FB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT
,Cast(GROSS_UNBILLED_DEFERRED_REV  AS DECIMAL (26,7) ) DV_FB_COMP_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT
,0 DV_FB_BASE_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
,0 DV_FB_ORD_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
,0 DV_NET_PRICE_CURR_MTH_USD_AMT
,0 DV_NET_PRICE_MTHPLS1_USD_AMT
,0 DV_NET_PRICE_MTHPLS2_USD_AMT
,0  DV_NET_PRICE_MTHPLS3_6_USD_AMT
,0  DV_NET_PRICE_MTHPLS7_USD_AMT
,0  DV_NET_PRICE_MTHMINUS6_USD_AMT
,0  DV_NET_PRICE_MTHMINUS7_USD_AMT
,0  DD_FB_INVOICED_QTY
,0  DD_FB_ORDER_QTY
,0 DD_FB_SHIPPED_QTY
,0 DV_FB_BACKLOG_QTY
,NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       AS  DV_FB_PROCESS_DT
, 'Y' DV_FB_CORP_FINANCE_BACKLOG_FLG
,'N' DD_FB_DV_OVERLAY_FLG
,'='DV_FB_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
,'=' DV_FB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
,'Y' DV_FB_REVENUE_FLG
,'Y' DV_FB_IC_REVENUE_FLG
,'N' DV_FB_CHARGES_FLG
,'N' DV_FB_MISC_FLG
,'N' DV_FB_SERVICE_FLG
,'N' DV_FB_SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG
,'N' DV_FB_HOLD_FLG          
, RANDOM (1000000,1001800)*-1 SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
,'AE' DD_FB_SS_CD
,FBL.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MONTH_ID  DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,USER
,Current_Timestamp(0)
,USER
,Current_Timestamp(0)
, 1 CONVERSION_RT
,-999 SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
,-999 DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,COALESCE(ATO.ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY22: April Release*/
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_AE_DFR_GROSS_UNBD_DATA_BKLOG_ADJ  FBL 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
  ON (FBL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID= NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
 INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOL 
 ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT   = CAST(FBL.DEAL_ID AS BIGINT) 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO 
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  =NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY         
AND NSO.SS_CODE IN ('CG','OPL') 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV ST  
   ON ST.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  =  FBL.SALES_TERRITORY_CODE          
   AND ST.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON  NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=FBL.PRODUCT_ID
/*ADDED BELOW JOIN AS PART OF Q3FY22: April Release*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT
ML_SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS ATO_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ML_PID.ITEM_KEY AS ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV ML_SOL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT ML_PID
WHERE ML_SOL.PRODUCT_KEY=ML_PID.ITEM_KEY
AND ML_PID.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'ATO MODEL'
AND ML_SOL.SS_CODE IN ('CG','OPL') 
AND CAST(ML_SOL.END_TV_DATETIME AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
)ATO
ON COALESCE(NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -9999) = ATO.ATO_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
